name: voice-agent-lab
description: A privacy-first simulation and training lab for customer-service and phone agents with customer-owned knowledge bases.

scripts.test: node tests/engine.test.js && node tests/voice_adapter.test.js && node tests/review_data.test.js && node tests/persona_sparring.test.js && node tests/improvement_workbench.test.js && node tests/config_validation.test.js && node tests/synthetic_packs.test.js && node tests/knowledge_base.test.js && node tests/evaluation_report.test.js && npm run validate:config && npm run validate:knowledge

author: F
